module.description: Module the signatures are scanned in, e.g. CrimsonDesert.exe

gameVersion.description: Exact build these were captured/verified on, e.g. 1.0.0.1744

id.description: Unique lowercase dotted id, e.g. player.position.write

category.description: Grouping, e.g. player, camera, world, input, interaction, inventory, render

pattern.description: IDA-style byte signature; '??' = wildcard. Empty string for an unverified placeholder.

offset.description: Byte offset from the match to the address you actually want (0 if the match IS the target).

resolve.description: 'none' = pattern+offset is the address. 'rip32' = follow a 32-bit rip-relative displacement at offset.

verified.description: true ONLY if you confirmed exactly one match on the stated gameVersion. Placeholders are false.
